content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Bit++". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/282/A
content.inputFormat: The input consists of a single integer n, followed by n lines containing a string each. Each string is either '++X' or 'X++'.
content.outputFormat: The final value of X after all operations have been applied.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Iterate over each operation and apply it to the variable X.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
x = 0
for _ in range(n):
    op = input()
    if op[0] == '+': x += 1
    if op[2] == '+': x += 1
print('X =', x)
